subcodes.first_line: This is a Book that speaketh with truth and beareth unto all peoples the glad-tidings of a most holy and exalted Paradise, drawing them that are nigh unto His sacred court [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب ینطق بالحق و یبشر الناس الی رضوان قدس علیا و یقرب المقربین الی ساحه
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @soul; spirit after death, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @martyrs and martyrdom, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
